title: cyperus hainanensis
intro: Cyperus hainanensis, also known as Hainan flatsedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This aquatic plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cyperus hainanensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Cyperus hainanensis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
